title: President Mahama Promises Economic Recovery
description: Government outlines new policies to strengthen Ghana's economy.

title: Three Arrested Over Mob Attack
description: Police confirm arrest of suspects involved in fatal assault case in Accra.

title: New Cartel Leader Arises in Mexico
description: Authorities confirm previous cartel leader has been arrested and killed.

title: Childhood Proposal Takes 7 Years
description: A man discovers his childhood crush is now engaged to his best friend after waiting seven years.

title: Armed Robbery Ends in Tragedy
description: An armed robber discovers the victim is his wife and reports himself to the police immediately.

title: Funny Incident Leaves Residents in Stitches
description: A hilarious incident during a local event leaves everyone laughing uncontrollably.
